scripts.preinstall: node -e "const r=(process.env.npm_config_registry||'https://registry.npmjs.org/').trim();let h='';try{h=new URL(r).hostname}catch(e){console.error('Invalid npm registry URL:',r);process.exit(1)}if(h!=='registry.npmjs.org'){console.error('Blocked npm registry: '+r+'. Use https://registry.npmjs.org/ for this personal project.');process.exit(1)}"
